nasb.text: She arose and bowed with her face to the ground and said, “Behold, your maidservant is a maid to wash the feet of my lord’s servants.”

esv.text: And she rose and bowed with her face to the ground and said, “Behold, your handmaid is a servant to wash the feet of the servants of my lord.”

cnv.text: 亞比該就起來，面伏於地叩拜，說：“婢女願意作女僕，洗我主人的腳！”

ccb.text: 亚比该听了，立刻俯伏在地上说：“婢女愿意效劳，为我主的仆人洗脚。”
